text:
that are appended to the Medicare Part D Event (PDE) file. Researchers need to request the specific variables required for their study and CMS must approve the release.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Product ID (NDC) used to link Drug Characteristics to PDE file
Brand name
Generic name
Strength
Form of the drug
Why do researchers request this file?
Researchers who do not have access to a proprietary NDC database use this file to identify specific drugs, strengths and
